changes_made: Changed 'k8s_audit_log_query_parameter_capture_enabled' to 'k8s_audit_query_parameter_logging_enabled' for clarity and consistency
review_notes: The functions are applicable as they relate to Kubernetes audit logging capabilities, which can be configured to capture API server requests, including query parameters. This is relevant for auditing access to PII. The naming mostly follows conventions but required a minor adjustment for clarity and consistency with existing patterns.
naming_improvements: Use 'k8s_audit_query_parameter_logging_enabled' instead of 'k8s_audit_log_query_parameter_capture_enabled' for better clarity
title: Audit Record Generation - Audit record generation | query parameter audits of personally identifiable info
step1_reasoning: The control AU-12(4) focuses on audit record generation, specifically auditing query parameters related to personally identifiable information (PII). In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to the audit logging capabilities of the API server. Kubernetes audit logs can be configured to capture requests, including query parameters, which is essential for auditing access to PII. The functions proposed ensure that API server request logging is enabled, query parameters are captured in audit logs, and sensitive data access is logged according to the audit policy.
